# VixFix Professional Services LLC

> Professional handyman and home repair contractor based in Concord, NH.
> Owner Justin Vickery personally handles every job — no subcontractors.
> Serving most of New Hampshire. Call 603-202-5309 or email Justin@VixFixPro.com.
> EPA Lead-Safe Certified. Fully insured.

## Services

- Interior and exterior painting (prep, priming, walls, trim, ceilings)
- Drywall repair and installation (patching, texture matching, full install)
- Water damage repair (ceiling restoration, drywall replacement, ice dam damage)
- Hardwood and LVP flooring installation (subfloor prep included)
- Laminate and engineered hardwood flooring
- Fire alarm and smoke detector installation (hardwired, battery, interconnected)
- Carbon monoxide detector installation (NH code compliant)
- TV mounting and cable management
- Furniture restoration (sofa restuffing, reupholstery, refinishing)
- Carpentry (framing, trim, cabinetry)
- General handyman services (repairs, assembly, odd jobs)
- EPA Lead-Safe work on pre-1978 homes

## Service Area

Concord, Manchester, Nashua, Salem, Derry, Bedford, Londonderry, Merrimack, and surrounding New Hampshire towns within approximately one hour of Concord.

## Contact

- Phone: 603-202-5309
- Email: Justin@VixFixPro.com
- Location: Concord, NH
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9 AM–5 PM
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/VixFix-Professional-Services-LLC-61570549505960/

## About

Justin Vickery founded VixFix Professional Services LLC to offer homeowners across New Hampshire a trustworthy, skilled alternative to large contracting outfits. Every job is handled personally by Justin — no subcontractors, no middlemen. VixFix is EPA Lead-Safe Certified, meaning Justin can legally and safely perform renovation work on homes built before 1978. Free estimates on all projects. Serving most of New Hampshire since 2024.
